title: HoloMobInfo
description: A clean high-tech mob info overlay with animated holographic panels, health bars, stats, and drop previews.
body:
# HoloMobInfo

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-07qTZo6yfs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

HoloMobInfo adds clean holographic information panels above mobs, turning simple health bars into a compact high-tech overlay.

**Instead of opening menus or guessing mob stats, you can see the most important information directly in the world: health, name, mod source, combat stats, movement speed, and optional drop information.**

![Promo 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d98f7bd8a0acca124411dd1da779c59919b650f_0.webp)
![Promo 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6ded7d358ded31222f718d27627c609cef2fd96_0.webp)

## Features

- Holographic mob health panels
- Compact and expanded panel states
- Smooth animated transitions
- Optional attack damage, armor, and movement speed stats
- Optional server-backed mob drop scanning
- Lightweight and readable high-tech visual style

## Drop Information

**_When supported by the server, HoloMobInfo can scan a mob's loot table and display possible drops directly in the expanded panel._**

**_On multiplayer servers, install the mod on both the client and the server to enable full drop syncing._**

## Configuration

The mod includes options for:

- Max display distance
- Attack damage visibility
- Armor visibility
- Movement speed visibility
- Drop visibility
- Mod source visibility
- Panel scale
- Animation speed
- Collapse delay
- Color theme

Available themes:

- Cyan
- Green
- Red
- Minimal

## Compatibility

HoloMobInfo is designed as a lightweight information overlay. It does not change mob behavior, combat mechanics, loot tables, world generation, or progression.

It is suitable for vanilla-style playthroughs, RPG modpacks, tech modpacks, adventure packs, and client-side quality-of-life setups.

## Notes

**Fabric versions require Fabric API.**

**_For the best multiplayer experience, install HoloMobInfo on both the client and the server. Client-only usage is still useful for basic mob information, but server-backed drop scanning requires server support._**
